response.overview: The story of three good friends living in a senior citizen home: Rahmat, Boon and Jaya. On the occasion of Rahmat's birthday, Jaya and Boon wish to fulfill whatever request their friend makes. It turns out that Rahmat harbors a desire to be free and escape from the senior citizen home where they live. Despite their hesitation and worry about the action they are taking, the three of them decide to run away from there. They flee without bringing any identification. Their disappearance is eventually noticed by the warden of the senior citizen home. The warden has requested Inspector Betul's help to find the three of them. Various incidents occur throughout the search to track down the three friends. Finally, they are found at Che Yah's house. But who is Che Yah? What is their connection with this woman?
response.title: Jangan Panjat Pagar Itu (TV1)
